desc: Stars illuminate the darkest night, part the thickest fog, and guide the lost girl back on track.

name: Votive Ballet
desc: Lost in the starry void, she watches fate's stars drown—each sinking spark a tidal roar threatening to consume her.

name: Playful Deduction
desc: At last, the postman appeared in sight! Lottie perked up at once and dashed downstairs: 'Detective Squad. Move out!'

name: Insightful Duo
desc: Clues don't just knock on the door!' said Bono. A great detective must prick up their ears and catch the secrets.

name: Springtime Reverie
desc: She brought warmth and care to the lonely elderly and read to the children enchanting fairy tales.

name: Dreamway Path
desc: Legend has it that rose fairies bring gifts. When the roses bloom, they appear, bearing a magical chest of wishes.

name: Belated Spring
desc: Spring is late this year, and the roses seem to have forgotten to bloom, leaving the garden cold and desolate.

name: Obliterated Secret
desc: Twenty years ago, a fire swallowed a small village with the soaring flames. Young Audrey was the sole survivor.

name: Adventure Glee
desc: Pete is always ready for adventures and never stops, even when tired. He's determined to spread joy to the world.

name: Luminous Guide
desc: To every lost soul, her words bring starlight to earth, gently brightening shadowed hearts.

name: Lively White World
desc: Scenery blurs in the snow. The poet writes winter's first verse: Life hidden beneath the pure white.

name: Unheard Affection
desc: She chooses her favorite scenic restaurant for their first date, where fish swim as they dine—sure he'll love it.

name: Labyrinth of Memory
desc: The little beings, drawn here by the moon, live here confusedly. Failing to guide them out could be disastrous!

name: Defense Module
desc: After countless trials, researchers finally created a module that adapts to any complex attack.

name: Counterattack Protocol
desc: During the counterattack, Norsen silently sends a virus, lurking like a ghost deep within the enemy system.

name: Dawn of Resolve
desc: Darkness corrodes the blade inch by inch. She cuts her palm with resolve, and her blood spills. All evil vanish.

name: Moonlight Vow
desc: She was a lively, naive girl raised in wheat fields. That day, she found a stranger bleeding on the ground.

name: Unsolved Riddle
desc: The crossroad is silent. Tall buildings cast quiet shadows. The world is lit only by silver moonlight.

name: Autumn's Bounty
desc: Grapes of neighbors gleam like gems. With pumpkins in hand, Loxie shares a joyful glance with them.

name: Fateful Script
desc: At the gala, the producer hails the movie's destined success. Ivanna smiles, heels edging toward the door.

name: Fairytale Journey
desc: Lulu is thrilled yet worried. She has no particular dream. She flips open the fairy tale book, seeking inspiration.

name: Fairytale Journey - Dream
desc: A breeze lifts her skirt. Sensing it, she glances back. Miss Sparrow and kind Grandma Rabbit smile at her from afar.

name: Unhurried Steps
desc: This is it!' She fills two illustrated pages: towering trees, fresh scents, squirrels jumping with pinecones…

name: Unhurried Steps - Berry
desc: Just as she imagined, the squirrels are clever, tails flicking, sometimes glancing back as if guiding her.

name: Wayfarer of World
desc: Intrigued, Nelly chooses vintage attire from the Apple Federation, uniquely shaped by time and difficult to recreate.

name: Wayfarer of World - Violet
desc: High heels click on old streets. The city is bathed in yellow dusk light, like a faded photo come vividly to life.

name: Rippling Time
desc: Like a stone thrown in a pool, her work ripples through the photography community, drawing great attention.

name: Time's Soft Murmur
desc: The theme is her hopes and visions of the future. As a designer, she longs to meet inspiration at every turn.

name: Bright Spring Glow
desc: Opening the studio door, Celia freezes. Sunlit water sparkles, fish swim happily, and birds sing their symphony.

name: Cloud Stairs to Moon
desc: Three hundred years ago, she was a dying wild chrysanthemum, saved by an elder passerby and nursed through winter.

name: Mire of Desire
desc: As mortals squander money, deities squander time. Tano grows weary of all things and seeks new amusement.

name: Entwined Twigs
desc: School friends scatter afar, yet youth is a breeze folded in letters, refreshing whenever unfolded.

name: Silhouette in Dream
desc: On a starry night, after work, she spots the puppy waiting for her in the alley, an invitation in its mouth.

name: Blooming Crystal Bud
desc: Follow the flowers to find our surprise...?' Nikki reads, a smile gently blooming on her face.

name: Scattered Fate
desc: The glaze lamp reflects Lin Yao's bright eyes. She smiles proudly, 'We are famed now, but who begrudges more fame?'

name: Blooming Moments
desc: This dress is gorgeous!' Miss Rabbit praises, as always. Mimi blushes, happy, yet sighing softly.

name: Fairytale of Sincerity
desc: The bear persists, 'Then… would you like a look around?' She nods. He takes her hand and they fly in as snowflakes.

name: Shared Moments
desc: Birdsong at her window, her mother's cake, and storybook villains… Tessa shared all her joys and sorrows with Snowy.

name: Winter's Magic
desc: Songs rise with the chimes to greet winter,' Loryn hummed her grandma's tune as a sudden thought stirred within her.

name: Winter's Ballad
desc: Drawn by the ringing, snow drifted down and gathered beneath trees, forming smiling snowmen crowned with mistletoe.

name: Hymn of the Coldwind
desc: On festival eve, she arrives on dreamlit starlight; frost blooms into crystal flowers, and bells ring in joy.

name: Emerald Reminiscence
desc: As preparations intensify, Risa's hoop snaps without warning, and her back adornments tangle as she turns.

name: Warm Breeze Dance
desc: Maxie checks every old note, dries the grain, and tweaks the recipe with care, yet every attempt ends in failure.

name: Gentle Breeze Waltz
desc: Deep in the valley, the green-clad fairy raises her cup. Tiny fairies tumble in clover as distant songs become their reward.

name: Light Footsteps
desc: The next afternoon, as Elno packs up her tools, the familiar fluff runs from the fields and gently rests its paws on her knee.

name: Invincible Advance
desc: No firewall stops her. She breaks through layers of defense and uncovers the carefully buried evidence.

name: Night Infiltration
desc: Amid perfume and toasts, Morton scans the room with champagne in hand, until he meets a pair of familiar eyes.

name: A Moment of Humor
desc: No dull moments. Every prop brings a surprise! Even simple boots makes a cute, quirky sound at just the right time.

name: Vivid Performance
desc: A festival of absurdity and lies is perfect for a bold show. Fiona decides to make it the troupe's new beginning.

name: Maple Viewing
desc: I'm back~ Red leaves fell on my shoes? No! It's the pattern!
